title: Mark Lifman’s business partner Andre Naude shot dead
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Seven months after businessman and alleged underworld figure, Mark Lifman, was gunned down in the parking lot at the Garden Route Mall on 3 November 2024, his business partner and friend, Andre Naude, was murdered in Parow this afternoon, 12 June.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Seven months after businessman and alleged underworld figure, Mark Lifman, was gunned down in the parking lot at the Garden Route Mall on 3 November 2024, his business partner and friend, Andre Naude, was murdered in Parow this afternoon, 12 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to reports, the shooting took place in Voortrekker Road. Naude was declared dead on the scene. Details surrounding the incident are still unclear."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald was told that Jerome “Donkie” Booysen, another business partner of Lifman and Naude and the alleged gang boss of the Sexy Boys, arrived on the scene afterwards.","html":"George Herald was told that Jerome “Donkie” Booysen, another business partner of Lifman and Naude and the alleged gang boss of the Sexy Boys, arrived on the scene afterwards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Naude and Booysen had on several occasions attended the court proceedings in George of the two men accused of Lifman’s murder, Johannes Jacobs and Gert Bezuidenhout.","html":"Naude and Booysen had on several occasions attended the court proceedings in George of the two men accused of Lifman’s murder, Johannes Jacobs and Gert Bezuidenhout."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Read more on the George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mark Lifman’s business partner Andre Naude shot dead
